src/main/java/com/students/studentProfil.general_idea: Explicitly exclude Spring Data Web auto-configuration to resolve conflicts or customize web layer behavior.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Added Spring Data JPA starter to enable database persistence capabilities.
Added MySQL Connector/J driver to support MySQL database connectivity.
Added Jakarta Validation API to support bean validation annotations.
Added Log4j SLF4J implementation to bridge SLF4J logging calls to Log4j2.
Added Log4j Core library to provide the underlying logging engine.
Added SpringDoc OpenAPI starter to generate Swagger UI documentation for the API.
Added Spring Boot DevTools to enable automatic restarts and live reload during development.
Excluded mockito-core from the test starter dependency, likely to manage version conflicts or use a different testing setup.
Removed empty license, developer, and SCM metadata blocks to clean up the POM file.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure the application to listen on port 8081 instead of the default.
Configure the primary MySQL datasource for the student management database.
Configure a secondary MySQL datasource for the teacher management database.
Enable SpringDoc API documentation and Swagger UI for endpoint visualization.
